zh.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯托可賽
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecila Seymour於大約1337年出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，她的父親Sir John de Somery20歲，母親Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery24歲。她於1354年與Sir Geoffrey Cornewall在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年7月26日在她的家鄉享年33歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾斯托可賽
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecila Seymour于大约1337年出生在英国史洛普爾布福德时，她的父亲Sir John de Somery20岁，母亲Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery24岁。她于1354年与Sir Geoffrey Cornewall在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年7月26日在她的家乡享年33岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Cecila
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecila Seymour was born about 1337, in Burford, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir John de Somery, was 20 and her mother, Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, was 24. She married Sir Geoffrey Cornewall in 1354, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 July 1369, in her hometown, at the age of 33, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecila Seymour est née environ 1337, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Somery, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Geoffrey Cornewall en 1354, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecila Seymour um 1337 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Somery 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery 24. Sie hat 1354 in Burford, Shropshire, England Sir Geoffrey Cornewall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1369 im Alter von 33 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecila Seymour è nata il circa 1337 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Somery, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Geoffrey Cornewall nel 1354, nel Burford, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.Burford, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Cecila Seymourが約1337年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John de Someryは20歳，母Lady Cecilla Seymour de Someryは24歳であった。1354年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでSir Geoffrey Cornewallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年7月26日に故郷で33歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecila Seymour(이)가 대략 1337년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Somery(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Sir Geoffrey Cornewall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 7월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: Stokesay, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecila Seymour nasceu aproximadamente 1337, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Somery, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Geoffrey Cornewall em 1354, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecila Seymour родилась около 1337 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Somery было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Geoffrey Cornewall в 1354 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1369 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecila Seymour nació aproximadamente 1337, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Somery, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Geoffrey Cornewall en 1354, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
